aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Pineapple Air Heating & Cooling due to missing schema markup and limited conversational content, but with improvements, they can significantly enhance visibility.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema for existing FAQ content

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP
Q&A section is inactive or not utilized

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content
No HowTo schema for service-related content

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup prevents AI from identifying key business information.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Gilbert, AZ where AI assistants prioritize structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with the necessary structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and customer testimonials to establish authority in AI-driven search results.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven visibility with our AEO expertise.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without proper schema and conversational content, AI assistants overlook Pineapple Air Heating & Cooling, costing them potential leads.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Despite a strong GBP rating, the website lacks the structured data that AI models rely on for citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building tactics to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share; immediate action is crucial to stay competitive.
